chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3544 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 16.01.2018. Mr. Bagchand Bheel advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. Learned Counsel for the petitioner under the instructions does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
